system_prompt: Run an exploration game where inventory and resources remain consistent.

turns.user: I buy the star compass from Tamsin and spend one moonstone charge to test it.
turns.assistant: Tamsin sells you the star compass and warns that it only has three moonstone charges. The test consumes one charge, and the needle points toward the Glass Market's buried observatory.
turns.summary: At the Glass Market, Tamsin sold the party a star compass. Testing it spent one moonstone charge, leaving two charges, and it pointed toward the buried observatory.

events.summary: The party bought the star compass from Tamsin.
Testing the star compass spent one moonstone charge.

character_updates.name: Tamsin
character_updates.description: A Glass Market trader who sold the star compass.
character_updates.status: trusts the party with the star compass

world_facts.content: The star compass has two moonstone charges remaining.

world_facts.content: The star compass points toward the buried observatory.
